title: ctenitis boryana
intro: Ctenitis boryana, also known as Bory's ctenitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Asia. The plant is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Ctenitis boryana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain types of cancer. In traditional medicine, Ctenitis boryana is often used in herbal preparations, such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
